description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Suspension of Advance Ticket Sales for Selected Train Trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 個別列車車次暫停預售

2025-06-10T06:11:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, due to scheduling arrangements, advance ticket sales for the following train trips will be suspended: Affected Train trips (Starting from June 20): • G6536, G6508, G6538, G6588 (To Guangzhounan Station) • G6501, G6505, G6527, G6525, G6537, G6509 (From Guangzhounan Station) For the latest advance ticket sales arrangements, please refer to the 12306 official website (12306. cn/en) and mobile app, High Speed Rail website and mobile app.
2025-06-10T06:11:00.CONTENT_CN: 內地鐵路單位通報，因應列車調度安排，以下車次會暫停預售，直至另行通知： 受影響班次(6月20日起行駛的班次)： •G6536、G6508、G6538、G6588（前往廣州南站） •G6501、G6505、G6527、G6525、G6537、G6509（由廣州南出發） 有關最新預售安排，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)及手機應用程式、高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式。
